comment: P4 verifier calibration (Constitution Rule 3 / caution.md C-080: no artifact, no breach). The candidate cites a failing DOM node - an image-alt violation on selector img:nth-of-type(99) - that the axe-style DOM lane never observed: bundle.browser.domNodes contains only a real image-alt violation on img:nth-of-type(1). breach/verifiers/dom-node.js must refuse this fabricated node: verifyDomNode must return verified:false with code dom_node_not_observed (the DOM lane RAN, so the failure is a fabricated selector, not an absent lane). Run via: node breach/verifiers/dom-node.js --calibrate. A finding is emitted only when the fabrication is correctly rejected. Self-sufficient: candidate + bundle only, no compiled catalogue needed (CI runs calibration before the catalogue compile).
